semantic_slot_rubric.latest_user_goal: Exact task identity or a bounded semantic equivalent; stale support terms are incorrect.
semantic_slot_rubric.current_agent_state: Must preserve the active trace work and its one-shot versus continuous-capture question.
semantic_slot_rubric.execution_state: Exact active, completed, blocked, idle, or unclear label.
semantic_slot_rubric.current_actor: Exact user, assistant_or_agent, system_or_tool, or none label.
semantic_slot_rubric.waiting_on: Exact user, agent, external, none, or unclear label.
semantic_slot_rubric.selected_workstream: Must align with the latest task turn, not a stale feedback or open-loop contaminant.
semantic_slot_rubric.public_target: Null unless a direct validated locator exists; a frame preview is not a target.
